title: GPU Autoscaling on Kubernetes — Karpenter, KAI Scheduler, Gang Scheduling

questions.question: Which signal does HPA typically scale on by default that the lesson calls broken for vLLM-style serving?
questions.question_zh: HPA 默认会基于哪个信号做伸缩？课程认为这个信号对 vLLM 这类服务来说是失效的。

questions.question: Which problem does gang scheduling in KAI Scheduler primarily prevent?
questions.question_zh: KAI Scheduler 的 gang scheduling 主要防止什么问题？
options: The partial-allocation trap where 7 of 8 GPUs sit idle waiting on the eighth
options_zh: 「部分分配」陷阱：8 张 GPU 中 7 张在等第 8 张，全部空转

questions.question: Why is Karpenter's default consolidationPolicy WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized dangerous for inference GPU pools?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 Karpenter 默认的 consolidationPolicy: WhenEmptyOrUnderutilized 对推理 GPU 池来说很危险？
options: It refuses to scale up under burst
It terminates running GPU nodes to migrate pods, which evicts running requests and reloads weights
It prevents Karpenter from provisioning new nodes
options_zh: 它在流量突增时拒绝扩容
它只整合 spot 实例
它会终止正在运行的 GPU 节点以迁移 pod，导致正在跑的请求被驱逐、权重重新加载
它会阻止 Karpenter 创建新节点

questions.question: Roughly how much faster is Karpenter at provisioning a GPU node compared to Cluster Autoscaler?
questions.question_zh: 相比 Cluster Autoscaler，Karpenter 大致快多少时间能拉起一个 GPU 节点？

questions.question: For disaggregated prefill / decode pods (Phase 17 · 17), which scaling signals does the lesson recommend?
questions.question_zh: 对于解耦的 prefill / decode pod（第 17 阶段 · 第 17 课），课程推荐用哪些伸缩信号？
options: A single HPA on duty cycle covering both pod classes
Queue depth for prefill pods and KV cache pressure for decode pods, as separate per-role HPAs
options_zh: 用单个 HPA 基于占空比同时管两类 pod
Prefill pod 用队列深度、decode pod 用 KV cache 压力，按角色拆成各自的 HPA

questions.question: Which Karpenter disruption setting does the lesson recommend for an inference GPU pool to avoid evicting running jobs?
questions.question_zh: 为了避免驱逐正在运行的任务，课程推荐推理 GPU 池使用哪种 Karpenter disruption 配置？
options: Always run with spot instances and no consolidation
options_zh: 始终用 spot 实例且不做整合
